mapper.select: select id, name, path, is_system, user_name as userName, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_workspaces where user_name = #{userName} or is_system = 1 order by updated_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_workspaces (id, name, path, is_system, user_name, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{path}, #{isSystem}, #{userName}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from zephyr_workspaces where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.select: select id, name, path, is_system, user_name as userName, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_workspaces where path = #{path} and user_name = #{userName}
select id, name, path, is_system, user_name as userName, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_workspaces where id = #{id}
